title: ByG RPG
description:
ModPack "Bonitos y Gorditos RPG 1.1.0" MC Server. 
Add to minecraft the RPG experience like leveling, jobs, classes, decorative items, weapons and more!
body:
## **Modpack Bonitos y Gorditos** - _RPG Minecraft Server_
![ModPack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e76daad591be79db7c14a10a8a749c75697027b.jpeg)\
ModPack created for MC Private Server of the comunitty "Bonitos y Gorditos".\
\
The propouse of this ModPack is create a MMORPG experience on Minecraft to enjoy with your friends.\
Based on Fabric 1.20.1-0.15.7\
\
**Principal Mods:**
- LevelZ,
- JobsAddons,
- Simply Skills,
- Better Combat,
- Add Classes (Archer, Wizard, etc.)
- More Mobs,
- Weapons,
- Decorative Items,
- Improved Villages and Villagers,
- Better End and Nether,
- Client-Server Optimization,
- etc.

Many thanks to the Modrinth Comunnity and Modders for all this mods <3!

**External Mods:**
> Curseforge:
> - [epherolib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epherolib)
> - [Croptopia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia)
> - [More Villagers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-villagers)
> - [Nether's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nethers-delight-fabric)

Everyone's invited to try the ModPack. Additionally, all comments and suggestions are welcome.
\
P.D.:_Only update the mods if is needed._
